TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kafakuhacan no atom a piharatengan romi'ad == I 1945 miheca 8 folad 6 romi'ad, i 8 folad 9 romi'ad mafakuhac no atom no sofitay no Amilika ko Hiroshima no Dipong, miliyaw haca i 8 folad 15 romi'ad ko pifakuhac no atom no sofitay no Amilika ko i Nagasaki no Dipong, nanoyaan mihapiw ko Dipong to awaayay ko salongoc a katapi'an, lalood no saka 2 no hekal nanoyaan sato paherek. ​Paretatenga ko 'alomanay a tamdaw pakayni i atom sakatapi' no Dipong. Nikawrira, onini tosaay a atom, cimadoka'ay mapatayay to pinaay 'ofadan a tamdaw, awaayho i 'ayaw ko matiniay. Ikor to no kalalood o kasakitakit ala misanga' sato micowat to hece sakalalood, "Hewise" (katalawan hece) misanga' to sapilengat to kata;awan, tangasa anini ira to ko patalaw to kanga'anga'ay no hekal. ​Micakoday to kanatal sapilood malengat ko lalood Paherek ko saka 2 lalood, itini i Taypinyang kalaloodan i, o Amilika ko sakakaay i kakomodan no sofitay saka ranikay micomod i sekal no Dipong, malowan ko malaomay mapaherek ko lalood, o nianan koya "micakoday to kanatal sapilood", paecasan micakod to Asiya Taypinyang sa'etal nano nicalapan no Dipong a kanatal. ​I 1945 miheca 3 folad, nipatatekoan sofitay ato sofitay maala to ko Saipan, Iwo kanatal papotalay no Dipong a kanatal, polong no micakodan to kanatal a halaka sakaira no paherekan – Okinawa. ​​Toya mihecaan 4 folad 1 romi'ad, o hitay no Amilika (nipatatekoan) ato hitay no Dipong micefong to pinaay mo'etepay 'ofad a sofitay, nawhani mitefad ko sofitay no Dipong to "Yusui (Kowareta hisui)" a cering, milongoc to sofitay mikinafalahay to 'orip, saka tadamakari'ang mala'om ko sofitay no tatosaay. ​​​Midotoc to paherekan lalood a nisa'osian itini i Okinawa lalood, no Amilika mata'elif ko 8 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay sofitay, ono Dipong mata'elif ko 10 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay a sofitay, roma sato mata'elif ko 14 'ofad mapatayay a finawlan. Naikoran no picalap to Dipong a pahecian ​Mafades ko madoka'ay mapatayay a sofitay no nipatatekoan. Pakayni Iocima ato Okinawa kanatal a lalood, mipasadak ko Dipong to sapidama to kanatal no niyah halaka "Sapitena' a sakalalood", mikinafalah ko finawlan sofitay no Dipong mikapot to misa'ayaw to nipatatekoan sofitay. ​​Itiya i, sician a hakasi ci Quincy Wright ato physics hakasi ci William Shockley pasalongan ko sowal, ano nipatatekoan sofitay mitelek micalay to sekal no Dipong, o aira ko 170 'ofad tangasa 400 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay no nipatatekoan sofitay, mapatayay tamdaw nai 40 'ofad tangasa 80 'ofadan saan, o madoka'ay mapatayay no Dipong salongan i 500 'ofad tangasa 1,000 'ofadan saan. ​​​Caay ko mamaharateng no Amilika, ano so'elin micalay to sekal no Dipong, o mapasadakay o tatadamaan ko paherekan no 'aca. Caay to ko tatikoen misa'osi ko Dipong I 1945 miheca 7 folad 26 romi'ad, Amilika, Congko, Inkiris toloay kitakit masasihapiw to "Potsdam sasowalen", mi'ang'ang to sifo no Dipong ranikayen mihapiw ko polong sofitay no Dipong i awaayay ko salongac a pitapi', ano caay aca o Dipong ko mipili'ay, to o "tahenayay matekop" . ​O "tahenayay matekop" o pipatalaw to sapidemak to Atom hakiya? Itini i "Potsdam sasowalen" awaay masowal, nika 7 folad 16 romi'ad itini i New Maxeco no Amilika mifakuhac to saka 1 Atom, tatami sa i 'ayaw no "kalomaoc i Potsdam" (1945.07.17-08.02) a romi'ad. ​​Talacowa "Potsdam sasowalen" mapali'ayaw to ano caay kakahi ko Dipong a mitapi', o sofitay no nipatatekoan mamicalap to sekal no Dipong, o "mamalaheci ko sakatekop no sofitay no Dipong, makari'ang ko sekal no Dipong to katalawan a tekop". ​​​Itiya, pakayni to "Potsdam sasowalen" caay pikihakihar "satalimaan" (Mokusatsu) sanay, o pinengneng sato no Amilika o "pakonira sanay mina'ay" (rejection by ignoring), misetek pakitekop ko pipatalaw, pakayni Manhattan halaka malaheci ko pisanga' to hece sakalalood. ​​​​Tosaay ko Atom itiya, masiiked o "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" a yotan ato "maso'soay tamdaw" a potan. O aitira i Kyoto, Hiroshima, Yokohama ato Kokura a niyaro' ko nipili'an sofitay no Amilika pitefadan to Atom, ikor sato miketon palasawad ko Kyoto, itira to i Hiroshima ato Kokura ko pitekolan a mitefad. Sarakatay pitefad to Atom I 1945 miheca 8 folad 6 romi'ad, ocoran no sofitay no Amilika ko B-29 sapipakuhac hikoki miwikid to "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" tayra i fafaed no Hiroshima, 'ayaw no lahok 8:15 mitefad to Atom, oya "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" mapakuhac itiya, o 12,000 tangasa 15,000 ton no TNT afet, i fafaed no Hiroshima to 600 kongce mapakuhac. ​Kapakuhacan salongan 9 tangasa 16.6 'ofad ko tamdaw mapatayay itiya, mataelif ko 10 'ofad no finawlan madadoedoay to pinapina foladan no fala'an adada rarasa a mapatay. O sarakatay i kalaloodan midemakay to heneng sapilood i 'oripan no tamdaw. O pafeli to saikoray pa'ayaw ​Mipakuhac ko sofitay no Amilika i Hiroshima i, pini to sowal ko congtong no Amilika ci Truman, mihapiw midemak to fa'e;ohay sakalalood a ratoh. ​​Pa'ayaw to sowal cingra to Dipong: "Akaa ka hinapec, o mamipeleng kami to sapipa;owad no Dipong to lalood a 'icel, ano caay pilayap to nitelekan niyam, o sapitekop a 'icel mamatiya o makerengay 'orad ko pitaktak, matiniay malodi' malawacay i hekal to ikor." ​​​Kaorira, o sifo no Dipong caay ka menimeniw a mikihar to Potsdam sasowalen. ​​​​Ikor no 3 romi'ad, 8 folad 9 romi'ad, oya nisahalakaan no sofitay no Amilika B29 sapipakuhac hikoki miwikid to "maso'soay wawa" pasi Kokura niyaro' mitefad to Atom, nika tatiih ko romi'ad no kakarayan no niyaro', kinatolo sapitanam mitefad caay ka laheci, nawhani kakaya' ko romi'ad i fafaed malaom ko simal, orasaka palalefed sa tayra ngataay niyaro a Nagasaki mitefad to Atom. ​​​​​Taya 'ayaw no lahok 11 ko toki, mapakohac salongan i 21,000 ton TNT a afed "maso'soay wawa" i fafaed no Nagasaki to 503 kongce mapakuhac. Mapakohac sa;ongan 6 tangasa 8 'ofad ko tamdaw mapatayay, masarar ko 10 'ofad a finawlad madadoedoay mifiyolay no Atom mapataay. Nanay manga'ay ko hekal ​Matefad no Amilika ko Atom ato Russia mihapiw to pilood to Dipong, masapinang o caacaay to ka patiyol ko lalood sato ko Showadenko, layap sato to ka tapi'an a demak, milayap to sofitay nipatatekoan i "Potsdam pihapiw" misetek to pipaherek to lalood a telekan. ​I 1945 miheca 8 folad 15 romi'ad 8 folad 15 romi'ad kalahokan 12 ko toki, pasifinawlan mihoso ko Showadenko, pasifinawlan no Dipong mihapiw to "katapi' no Dipong", sanoyaan o sa'alomanay cimapatayay i safades i saka tosa lalood no hekal ko paherekan. ​​Ikor, to mihecahecaan 8 folad 6 romi'ad kafakuhacan no atom a piharatengan romi'ad no Dipong, itira i "Kanga'ayan piharatengan koying i Hiroshima" midemak to piharatengan lisin, sapihinom to nai mapakuhacay no atom a mapatayay salo'afang, itiya mitolon to pida'oc manganga'ay no hekal. Mikawitay: Wu Shengxian (Sin Taywan heping kikingkay dademakay) === Mifalicay: ci Masao Nikar ===
S.PHON: == kafako~u~uħaʦan no~u ato~um a piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafako~u~uħaʦ no~u ato~um no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u ħiro~usħima no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, miɾijaw ħaʦa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u pifako~u~uħaʦ no~u ato~um no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u i na*asaki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~ujaan miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u awaajaj ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a katapiʡan, ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saka * no~u ħəkaɾ nano~ujaan sato~u paħərək. *parətatəŋa ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw pakajni i ato~um sakatapiʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. nikawrira, o~unini to~usaaj a ato~um, ʦimaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj to~u pinaaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw, awaajħo~u i ʡajaw ko~u matiniaj. iko~ur to~u no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~u kasakitakit aɾa misaŋaʡ sato~u miʦo~uwat to~u ħəʦə sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, "ħəwisə" (kataɾawan ħəʦə) misaŋaʡ to~u sapiɾəŋat to~u kata;awan, taŋasa anini ira to~u ko~u pataɾaw to~u kaŋaʡaŋaʡaj no~u ħəkaɾ. *miʦako~uɬ~ɮaj to~u kanataɾ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maɾəŋat ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ paħərək ko~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, itini i tajpinjaŋ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, o~u amiɾika ko~u sakakaaj i kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj saka ranikaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾo~uwan ko~u maɾao~umaj mapaħərək ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u nianan ko~uja "miʦako~uɬ~ɮaj to~u kanataɾ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", paəʦasan miʦako~uɬ~ɮ to~u asija tajpinjaŋ saʡətaɾ nano~u niʦaɾapan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ. *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj ato~u so~ufitaj maaɾa to~u ko~u saipan, iwo~u kanataɾ papo~utaɾaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u miʦako~uɬ~ɮan to~u kanataɾ a ħaɾaka sakaira no~u paħərəkan * o~ukinawa. **to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħitaj no~u amiɾika (nipatatəko~uan) ato~u ħitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦəfo~uŋ to~u pinaaj mo~uʡətəpaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a so~ufitaj, nawħani mitəfaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u "jo~u~uso~u~ui (ko~uwarəta ħiso~u~ui)" a ʦəriŋ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj mikinafaɾaħaj to~u ʡo~urip, saka taɬ~ɮamakariʡaŋ maɾaʡo~um ko~u so~ufitaj no~u tato~usaaj. ***miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paħərəkan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a nisaʡo~usian itini i o~ukinawa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, no~u amiɾika mataʡəɾif ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj so~ufitaj, o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mataʡəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj a so~ufitaj, ro~uma sato~u mataʡəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ mapatajaj a finawɾan. naiko~uran no~u piʦaɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a paħəʦian *mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj a so~ufitaj no~u nipatatəko~uan. pakajni io~uʦima ato~u o~ukinawa kanataɾ a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, mipasaɬ~ɮak ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮama to~u kanataɾ no~u nijaħ ħaɾaka "sapitənaʡ a sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", mikinafaɾaħ ko~u finawɾan so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mikapo~ut to~u misaʡajaw to~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj. **itija i, siʦian a ħakasi ʦi *o~u~uinʦj wri*ħt ato~u pħjsiʦs ħakasi ʦi wiɾɾiam sħo~uʦkɾəj pasaɾo~uŋan ko~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj mitəɾək miʦaɾaj to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u aira ko~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj no~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj, mapatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw nai ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan saan, o~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan i *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa *,*** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan saan. ***ʦaaj ko~u mamaħaratəŋ no~u amiɾika, ano~u so~uʡəɾin miʦaɾaj to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u mapasaɬ~ɮakaj o~u tataɬ~ɮamaan ko~u paħərəkan no~u ʡaʦa. ʦaaj to~u ko~u tatiko~uən misaʡo~usi ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, amiɾika, ʦo~uŋko~u, inkiris to~uɾo~uaj kitakit masasiħapiw to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən", miʡaŋʡaŋ to~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ranikajən miħapiw ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i awaajaj ko~u saɾo~uŋaʦ a pitapiʡ, ano~u ʦaaj aʦa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u mipiɾiʡaj, to~u o~u "taħənajaj matəko~up" . *o~u "taħənajaj matəko~up" o~u pipataɾaw to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak to~u ato~um ħakija? itini i "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" awaaj maso~uwaɾ, nika * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itini i nəw maxəʦo~u no~u amiɾika mifako~u~uħaʦ to~u saka * ato~um, tatami sa i ʡajaw no~u "kaɾo~umao~uʦ i po~utsɬ~ɮam" (****.**.**-**.**) a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. **taɾaʦo~uwa "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" mapaɾiʡajaw to~u ano~u ʦaaj kakaħi ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitapiʡ, o~u so~ufitaj no~u nipatatəko~uan mamiʦaɾap to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u "mamaɾaħəʦi ko~u sakatəko~up no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, makariʡaŋ ko~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kataɾawan a təko~up". ***itija, pakajni to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" ʦaaj pikiħakiħar "sataɾimaan" (mo~uko~u~usatso~u~u) sanaj, o~u pinəŋnəŋ sato~u no~u amiɾika o~u "pako~unira sanaj minaʡaj" (rəjəʦtio~un b~b~vj i*no~uriŋ), misətək pakitəko~up ko~u pipataɾaw, pakajni manħattan ħaɾaka maɾaħəʦi ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ħəʦə sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. ****to~usaaj ko~u ato~um itija, masiikəɬ~ɮ o~u "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" a jo~utan ato~u "maso~uʡso~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw" a po~utan. o~u aitira i kjo~uto~u, ħiro~usħima, jo~uko~uħama ato~u ko~uko~u~ura a nijaro~uʡ ko~u nipiɾiʡan so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika pitəfaɬ~ɮan to~u ato~um, iko~ur sato~u mikəto~un paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kjo~uto~u, itira to~u i ħiro~usħima ato~u ko~uko~u~ura ko~u pitəko~uɾan a mitəfaɬ~ɮ. sarakataj pitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uʦo~uran no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u b~b~v-** sapipako~u~uħaʦ ħiko~uki miwikiɬ~ɮ to~u "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" tajra i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u ħiro~usħima, ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk *:** mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um, o~uja "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" mapako~u~uħaʦ itija, o~u **,*** taŋasa **,*** to~un no~u tnt afət, i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u ħiro~usħima to~u *** ko~uŋʦə mapako~u~uħaʦ. *kapako~u~uħaʦan saɾo~uŋan * taŋasa **.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapatajaj itija, mataəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u pinapina fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan no~u faɾaʡan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa rarasa a mapataj. o~u sarakataj i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ħənəŋ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʡo~uripan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pafəɾi to~u saiko~uraj paʡajaw *mipako~u~uħaʦ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika i ħiro~usħima i, pini to~u so~uwaɾ ko~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman, miħapiw miɬ~ɮəmak to~u faʡə;o~uħaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a rato~uħ. **paʡajaw to~u so~uwaɾ ʦiŋra to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: "akaa ka ħinapəʦ, o~u mamipəɾəŋ kami to~u sapipa;o~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a ʡiʦəɾ, ano~u ʦaaj piɾajap to~u nitəɾəkan nijam, o~u sapitəko~up a ʡiʦəɾ mamatija o~u makərəŋaj ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u pitaktak, matiniaj maɾo~uɬ~ɮiʡ maɾawaʦaj i ħəkaɾ to~u iko~ur." ***kao~urira, o~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦaaj ka məniməniw a mikiħar to~u po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən. ****iko~ur no~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja nisaħaɾakaan no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika b~b~v** sapipako~u~uħaʦ ħiko~uki miwikiɬ~ɮ to~u "maso~uʡso~uaj wawa" pasi ko~uko~u~ura nijaro~uʡ mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um, nika tatiiħ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u kakarajan no~u nijaro~uʡ, kinato~uɾo~u sapitanam mitəfaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi, nawħani kakajaʡ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i fafaəɬ~ɮ maɾao~um ko~u simaɾ, o~urasaka paɾaɾəfəɬ~ɮ sa tajra ŋataaj nijaro~u a na*asaki mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um. *****taja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki, mapako~uħaʦ saɾo~uŋan i **,*** to~un tnt a afəɬ~ɮ "maso~uʡso~uaj wawa" i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u na*asaki to~u *** ko~uŋʦə mapako~u~uħaʦ. mapako~uħaʦ sa;o~uŋan * taŋasa * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapatajaj, masarar ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a finawɾaɬ~ɮ maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj mifijo~uɾaj no~u ato~um mapataaj. nanaj maŋaʡaj ko~u ħəkaɾ *matəfaɬ~ɮ no~u amiɾika ko~u ato~um ato~u ro~u~ussia miħapiw to~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, masapinaŋ o~u ʦaaʦaaj to~u ka patijo~uɾ ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u sħo~uwaɬ~ɮənko~u, ɾajap sato~u to~u ka tapiʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak, miɾajap to~u so~ufitaj nipatatəko~uan i "po~utsɬ~ɮam piħapiw" misətək to~u pipaħərək to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a təɾəkan. *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾaħo~ukan ** ko~u to~uki, pasifinawɾan miħo~uso~u ko~u sħo~uwaɬ~ɮənko~u, pasifinawɾan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miħapiw to~u "katapiʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ", sano~ujaan o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ʦimapatajaj i safaɬ~ɮəs i saka to~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ ko~u paħərəkan. **iko~ur, to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kafako~u~uħaʦan no~u ato~um a piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, itira i "kaŋaʡajan piħaratəŋan ko~ujiŋ i ħiro~usħima" miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan ɾisin, sapiħino~um to~u nai mapako~u~uħaʦaj no~u ato~um a mapatajaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, itija mito~uɾo~un to~u piɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ maŋaŋaʡaj no~u ħəkaɾ. mikawitaj: wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin tajwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj) === mifaɾiʦaj: ʦi masao~u nikar ===
S.FORM: == Kafakuhacan no atom a piharatengan romi'ad == I 1945 miheca 8 folad 6 romi'ad, i 8 folad 9 romi'ad mafakuhac no atom no sofitay no Amilika ko Hiroshima no Dipong, miliyaw haca i 8 folad 15 romi'ad ko pifakuhac no atom no sofitay no Amilika ko i Nagasaki no Dipong, nanoyaan mihapiw ko Dipong to awaayay ko salongoc a katapi'an, lalood no saka 2 no hekal nanoyaan sato paherek. ​Paretatenga ko 'alomanay a tamdaw pakayni i atom sakatapi' no Dipong. Nikawrira, onini tosaay a atom, cimadoka'ay mapatayay to pinaay 'ofadan a tamdaw, awaayho i 'ayaw ko matiniay. Ikor to no kalalood o kasakitakit ala misanga' sato micowat to hece sakalalood, "Hewise" (katalawan hece) misanga' to sapilengat to kata;awan, tangasa anini ira to ko patalaw to kanga'anga'ay no hekal. ​Micakoday to kanatal sapilood malengat ko lalood Paherek ko saka 2 lalood, itini i Taypinyang kalaloodan i, o Amilika ko sakakaay i kakomodan no sofitay saka ranikay micomod i sekal no Dipong, malowan ko malaomay mapaherek ko lalood, o nianan koya "micakoday to kanatal sapilood", paecasan micakod to Asiya Taypinyang sa'etal nano nicalapan no Dipong a kanatal. ​I 1945 miheca 3 folad, nipatatekoan sofitay ato sofitay maala to ko Saipan, Iwo kanatal papotalay no Dipong a kanatal, polong no micakodan to kanatal a halaka sakaira no paherekan – Okinawa. ​​Toya mihecaan 4 folad 1 romi'ad, o hitay no Amilika (nipatatekoan) ato hitay no Dipong micefong to pinaay mo'etepay 'ofad a sofitay, nawhani mitefad ko sofitay no Dipong to "Yusui (Kowareta hisui)" a cering, milongoc to sofitay mikinafalahay to 'orip, saka tadamakari'ang mala'om ko sofitay no tatosaay. ​​​Midotoc to paherekan lalood a nisa'osian itini i Okinawa lalood, no Amilika mata'elif ko 8 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay sofitay, ono Dipong mata'elif ko 10 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay a sofitay, roma sato mata'elif ko 14 'ofad mapatayay a finawlan. Naikoran no picalap to Dipong a pahecian ​Mafades ko madoka'ay mapatayay a sofitay no nipatatekoan. Pakayni Iocima ato Okinawa kanatal a lalood, mipasadak ko Dipong to sapidama to kanatal no niyah halaka "Sapitena' a sakalalood", mikinafalah ko finawlan sofitay no Dipong mikapot to misa'ayaw to nipatatekoan sofitay. ​​Itiya i, sician a hakasi ci Quincy Wright ato physics hakasi ci William Shockley pasalongan ko sowal, ano nipatatekoan sofitay mitelek micalay to sekal no Dipong, o aira ko 170 'ofad tangasa 400 'ofad ko madoka'ay mapatayay no nipatatekoan sofitay, mapatayay tamdaw nai 40 'ofad tangasa 80 'ofadan saan, o madoka'ay mapatayay no Dipong salongan i 500 'ofad tangasa 1,000 'ofadan saan. ​​​Caay ko mamaharateng no Amilika, ano so'elin micalay to sekal no Dipong, o mapasadakay o tatadamaan ko paherekan no 'aca. Caay to ko tatikoen misa'osi ko Dipong I 1945 miheca 7 folad 26 romi'ad, Amilika, Congko, Inkiris toloay kitakit masasihapiw to "Potsdam sasowalen", mi'ang'ang to sifo no Dipong ranikayen mihapiw ko polong sofitay no Dipong i awaayay ko salongac a pitapi', ano caay aca o Dipong ko mipili'ay, to o "tahenayay matekop" . ​O "tahenayay matekop" o pipatalaw to sapidemak to Atom hakiya? Itini i "Potsdam sasowalen" awaay masowal, nika 7 folad 16 romi'ad itini i New Maxeco no Amilika mifakuhac to saka 1 Atom, tatami sa i 'ayaw no "kalomaoc i Potsdam" (1945.07.17-08.02) a romi'ad. ​​Talacowa "Potsdam sasowalen" mapali'ayaw to ano caay kakahi ko Dipong a mitapi', o sofitay no nipatatekoan mamicalap to sekal no Dipong, o "mamalaheci ko sakatekop no sofitay no Dipong, makari'ang ko sekal no Dipong to katalawan a tekop". ​​​Itiya, pakayni to "Potsdam sasowalen" caay pikihakihar "satalimaan" (Mokusatsu) sanay, o pinengneng sato no Amilika o "pakonira sanay mina'ay" (rejection by ignoring), misetek pakitekop ko pipatalaw, pakayni Manhattan halaka malaheci ko pisanga' to hece sakalalood. ​​​​Tosaay ko Atom itiya, masiiked o "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" a yotan ato "maso'soay tamdaw" a potan. O aitira i Kyoto, Hiroshima, Yokohama ato Kokura a niyaro' ko nipili'an sofitay no Amilika pitefadan to Atom, ikor sato miketon palasawad ko Kyoto, itira to i Hiroshima ato Kokura ko pitekolan a mitefad. Sarakatay pitefad to Atom I 1945 miheca 8 folad 6 romi'ad, ocoran no sofitay no Amilika ko B-29 sapipakuhac hikoki miwikid to "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" tayra i fafaed no Hiroshima, 'ayaw no lahok 8:15 mitefad to Atom, oya "mimingay wawa to fa'inayan" mapakuhac itiya, o 12,000 tangasa 15,000 ton no TNT afet, i fafaed no Hiroshima to 600 kongce mapakuhac. ​Kapakuhacan salongan 9 tangasa 16.6 'ofad ko tamdaw mapatayay itiya, mataelif ko 10 'ofad no finawlan madadoedoay to pinapina foladan no fala'an adada rarasa a mapatay. O sarakatay i kalaloodan midemakay to heneng sapilood i 'oripan no tamdaw. O pafeli to saikoray pa'ayaw ​Mipakuhac ko sofitay no Amilika i Hiroshima i, pini to sowal ko congtong no Amilika ci Truman, mihapiw midemak to fa'e;ohay sakalalood a ratoh. ​​Pa'ayaw to sowal cingra to Dipong: "Akaa ka hinapec, o mamipeleng kami to sapipa;owad no Dipong to lalood a 'icel, ano caay pilayap to nitelekan niyam, o sapitekop a 'icel mamatiya o makerengay 'orad ko pitaktak, matiniay malodi' malawacay i hekal to ikor." ​​​Kaorira, o sifo no Dipong caay ka menimeniw a mikihar to Potsdam sasowalen. ​​​​Ikor no 3 romi'ad, 8 folad 9 romi'ad, oya nisahalakaan no sofitay no Amilika B29 sapipakuhac hikoki miwikid to "maso'soay wawa" pasi Kokura niyaro' mitefad to Atom, nika tatiih ko romi'ad no kakarayan no niyaro', kinatolo sapitanam mitefad caay ka laheci, nawhani kakaya' ko romi'ad i fafaed malaom ko simal, orasaka palalefed sa tayra ngataay niyaro a Nagasaki mitefad to Atom. ​​​​​Taya 'ayaw no lahok 11 ko toki, mapakohac salongan i 21,000 ton TNT a afed "maso'soay wawa" i fafaed no Nagasaki to 503 kongce mapakuhac. Mapakohac sa;ongan 6 tangasa 8 'ofad ko tamdaw mapatayay, masarar ko 10 'ofad a finawlad madadoedoay mifiyolay no Atom mapataay. Nanay manga'ay ko hekal ​Matefad no Amilika ko Atom ato Russia mihapiw to pilood to Dipong, masapinang o caacaay to ka patiyol ko lalood sato ko Showadenko, layap sato to ka tapi'an a demak, milayap to sofitay nipatatekoan i "Potsdam pihapiw" misetek to pipaherek to lalood a telekan. ​I 1945 miheca 8 folad 15 romi'ad 8 folad 15 romi'ad kalahokan 12 ko toki, pasifinawlan mihoso ko Showadenko, pasifinawlan no Dipong mihapiw to "katapi' no Dipong", sanoyaan o sa'alomanay cimapatayay i safades i saka tosa lalood no hekal ko paherekan. ​​Ikor, to mihecahecaan 8 folad 6 romi'ad kafakuhacan no atom a piharatengan romi'ad no Dipong, itira i "Kanga'ayan piharatengan koying i Hiroshima" midemak to piharatengan lisin, sapihinom to nai mapakuhacay no atom a mapatayay salo'afang, itiya mitolon to pida'oc manganga'ay no hekal. Mikawitay: Wu Shengxian (Sin Taywan heping kikingkay dademakay) === Mifalicay: ci Masao Nikar ===
S.PHON: == kafako~u~uħaʦan no~u ato~um a piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafako~u~uħaʦ no~u ato~um no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u ħiro~usħima no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, miɾijaw ħaʦa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u pifako~u~uħaʦ no~u ato~um no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u i na*asaki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~ujaan miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u awaajaj ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a katapiʡan, ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saka * no~u ħəkaɾ nano~ujaan sato~u paħərək. *parətatəŋa ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw pakajni i ato~um sakatapiʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. nikawrira, o~unini to~usaaj a ato~um, ʦimaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj to~u pinaaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw, awaajħo~u i ʡajaw ko~u matiniaj. iko~ur to~u no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~u kasakitakit aɾa misaŋaʡ sato~u miʦo~uwat to~u ħəʦə sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, "ħəwisə" (kataɾawan ħəʦə) misaŋaʡ to~u sapiɾəŋat to~u kata;awan, taŋasa anini ira to~u ko~u pataɾaw to~u kaŋaʡaŋaʡaj no~u ħəkaɾ. *miʦako~uɬ~ɮaj to~u kanataɾ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maɾəŋat ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ paħərək ko~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, itini i tajpinjaŋ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i, o~u amiɾika ko~u sakakaaj i kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj saka ranikaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾo~uwan ko~u maɾao~umaj mapaħərək ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u nianan ko~uja "miʦako~uɬ~ɮaj to~u kanataɾ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", paəʦasan miʦako~uɬ~ɮ to~u asija tajpinjaŋ saʡətaɾ nano~u niʦaɾapan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ. *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj ato~u so~ufitaj maaɾa to~u ko~u saipan, iwo~u kanataɾ papo~utaɾaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kanataɾ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u miʦako~uɬ~ɮan to~u kanataɾ a ħaɾaka sakaira no~u paħərəkan * o~ukinawa. **to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħitaj no~u amiɾika (nipatatəko~uan) ato~u ħitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦəfo~uŋ to~u pinaaj mo~uʡətəpaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a so~ufitaj, nawħani mitəfaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u "jo~u~uso~u~ui (ko~uwarəta ħiso~u~ui)" a ʦəriŋ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj mikinafaɾaħaj to~u ʡo~urip, saka taɬ~ɮamakariʡaŋ maɾaʡo~um ko~u so~ufitaj no~u tato~usaaj. ***miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u paħərəkan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a nisaʡo~usian itini i o~ukinawa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, no~u amiɾika mataʡəɾif ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj so~ufitaj, o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mataʡəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj a so~ufitaj, ro~uma sato~u mataʡəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ mapatajaj a finawɾan. naiko~uran no~u piʦaɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a paħəʦian *mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj a so~ufitaj no~u nipatatəko~uan. pakajni io~uʦima ato~u o~ukinawa kanataɾ a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, mipasaɬ~ɮak ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮama to~u kanataɾ no~u nijaħ ħaɾaka "sapitənaʡ a sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", mikinafaɾaħ ko~u finawɾan so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mikapo~ut to~u misaʡajaw to~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj. **itija i, siʦian a ħakasi ʦi *o~u~uinʦj wri*ħt ato~u pħjsiʦs ħakasi ʦi wiɾɾiam sħo~uʦkɾəj pasaɾo~uŋan ko~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj mitəɾək miʦaɾaj to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u aira ko~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj no~u nipatatəko~uan so~ufitaj, mapatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw nai ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan saan, o~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj mapatajaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan i *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ taŋasa *,*** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan saan. ***ʦaaj ko~u mamaħaratəŋ no~u amiɾika, ano~u so~uʡəɾin miʦaɾaj to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u mapasaɬ~ɮakaj o~u tataɬ~ɮamaan ko~u paħərəkan no~u ʡaʦa. ʦaaj to~u ko~u tatiko~uən misaʡo~usi ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, amiɾika, ʦo~uŋko~u, inkiris to~uɾo~uaj kitakit masasiħapiw to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən", miʡaŋʡaŋ to~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ranikajən miħapiw ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i awaajaj ko~u saɾo~uŋaʦ a pitapiʡ, ano~u ʦaaj aʦa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u mipiɾiʡaj, to~u o~u "taħənajaj matəko~up" . *o~u "taħənajaj matəko~up" o~u pipataɾaw to~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak to~u ato~um ħakija? itini i "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" awaaj maso~uwaɾ, nika * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itini i nəw maxəʦo~u no~u amiɾika mifako~u~uħaʦ to~u saka * ato~um, tatami sa i ʡajaw no~u "kaɾo~umao~uʦ i po~utsɬ~ɮam" (****.**.**-**.**) a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. **taɾaʦo~uwa "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" mapaɾiʡajaw to~u ano~u ʦaaj kakaħi ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mitapiʡ, o~u so~ufitaj no~u nipatatəko~uan mamiʦaɾap to~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u "mamaɾaħəʦi ko~u sakatəko~up no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, makariʡaŋ ko~u səkaɾ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kataɾawan a təko~up". ***itija, pakajni to~u "po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən" ʦaaj pikiħakiħar "sataɾimaan" (mo~uko~u~usatso~u~u) sanaj, o~u pinəŋnəŋ sato~u no~u amiɾika o~u "pako~unira sanaj minaʡaj" (rəjəʦtio~un b~b~vj i*no~uriŋ), misətək pakitəko~up ko~u pipataɾaw, pakajni manħattan ħaɾaka maɾaħəʦi ko~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ħəʦə sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. ****to~usaaj ko~u ato~um itija, masiikəɬ~ɮ o~u "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" a jo~utan ato~u "maso~uʡso~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw" a po~utan. o~u aitira i kjo~uto~u, ħiro~usħima, jo~uko~uħama ato~u ko~uko~u~ura a nijaro~uʡ ko~u nipiɾiʡan so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika pitəfaɬ~ɮan to~u ato~um, iko~ur sato~u mikəto~un paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kjo~uto~u, itira to~u i ħiro~usħima ato~u ko~uko~u~ura ko~u pitəko~uɾan a mitəfaɬ~ɮ. sarakataj pitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uʦo~uran no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u b~b~v-** sapipako~u~uħaʦ ħiko~uki miwikiɬ~ɮ to~u "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" tajra i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u ħiro~usħima, ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk *:** mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um, o~uja "mimiŋaj wawa to~u faʡinajan" mapako~u~uħaʦ itija, o~u **,*** taŋasa **,*** to~un no~u tnt afət, i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u ħiro~usħima to~u *** ko~uŋʦə mapako~u~uħaʦ. *kapako~u~uħaʦan saɾo~uŋan * taŋasa **.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapatajaj itija, mataəɾif ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u pinapina fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan no~u faɾaʡan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa rarasa a mapataj. o~u sarakataj i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ħənəŋ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʡo~uripan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pafəɾi to~u saiko~uraj paʡajaw *mipako~u~uħaʦ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika i ħiro~usħima i, pini to~u so~uwaɾ ko~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi tro~u~uman, miħapiw miɬ~ɮəmak to~u faʡə;o~uħaj sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a rato~uħ. **paʡajaw to~u so~uwaɾ ʦiŋra to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: "akaa ka ħinapəʦ, o~u mamipəɾəŋ kami to~u sapipa;o~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a ʡiʦəɾ, ano~u ʦaaj piɾajap to~u nitəɾəkan nijam, o~u sapitəko~up a ʡiʦəɾ mamatija o~u makərəŋaj ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u pitaktak, matiniaj maɾo~uɬ~ɮiʡ maɾawaʦaj i ħəkaɾ to~u iko~ur." ***kao~urira, o~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦaaj ka məniməniw a mikiħar to~u po~utsɬ~ɮam saso~uwaɾən. ****iko~ur no~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja nisaħaɾakaan no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika b~b~v** sapipako~u~uħaʦ ħiko~uki miwikiɬ~ɮ to~u "maso~uʡso~uaj wawa" pasi ko~uko~u~ura nijaro~uʡ mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um, nika tatiiħ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u kakarajan no~u nijaro~uʡ, kinato~uɾo~u sapitanam mitəfaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi, nawħani kakajaʡ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i fafaəɬ~ɮ maɾao~um ko~u simaɾ, o~urasaka paɾaɾəfəɬ~ɮ sa tajra ŋataaj nijaro~u a na*asaki mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u ato~um. *****taja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki, mapako~uħaʦ saɾo~uŋan i **,*** to~un tnt a afəɬ~ɮ "maso~uʡso~uaj wawa" i fafaəɬ~ɮ no~u na*asaki to~u *** ko~uŋʦə mapako~u~uħaʦ. mapako~uħaʦ sa;o~uŋan * taŋasa * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapatajaj, masarar ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ a finawɾaɬ~ɮ maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj mifijo~uɾaj no~u ato~um mapataaj. nanaj maŋaʡaj ko~u ħəkaɾ *matəfaɬ~ɮ no~u amiɾika ko~u ato~um ato~u ro~u~ussia miħapiw to~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, masapinaŋ o~u ʦaaʦaaj to~u ka patijo~uɾ ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u sħo~uwaɬ~ɮənko~u, ɾajap sato~u to~u ka tapiʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak, miɾajap to~u so~ufitaj nipatatəko~uan i "po~utsɬ~ɮam piħapiw" misətək to~u pipaħərək to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a təɾəkan. *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaɾaħo~ukan ** ko~u to~uki, pasifinawɾan miħo~uso~u ko~u sħo~uwaɬ~ɮənko~u, pasifinawɾan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miħapiw to~u "katapiʡ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ", sano~ujaan o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ʦimapatajaj i safaɬ~ɮəs i saka to~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ ko~u paħərəkan. **iko~ur, to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kafako~u~uħaʦan no~u ato~um a piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, itira i "kaŋaʡajan piħaratəŋan ko~ujiŋ i ħiro~usħima" miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan ɾisin, sapiħino~um to~u nai mapako~u~uħaʦaj no~u ato~um a mapatajaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, itija mito~uɾo~un to~u piɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ maŋaŋaʡaj no~u ħəkaɾ. mikawitaj: wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin tajwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj) === mifaɾiʦaj: ʦi masao~u nikar ===
